scripts.start:dev: npm run kill:rpc && npm run refresh:frontend && npm run build:rpc && start "" /B .\rpc-bridge.exe && tsc && npm run start
scripts.build:rpc: rimraf rpc-bridge.exe build-rpc && tsc -p tsconfig.websocket.json && pkg build-rpc/websocket.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output rpc-bridge.exe
scripts.linter: npm run prettierrc && npm run lint:fix
scripts.release: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run build:rpc && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('dist/nikkepwned',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('rpc-bridge.exe','dist/nikkepwned/rpc-bridge.exe');" && neu build --release && npm run embed:admin && ts-node --transpile-only --compiler-options "{\"module\":\"CommonJS\",\"moduleResolution\":\"node\",\"types\":[\"node\"]}" ci/pack-release-zip.ts
scripts.build:fresh: npm run clean && npm run update && npm run build && npm run release && npm run build:rpc
